chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No. D-1228 of 2023 Fresh Case 1.For order son CMA7423/2023 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on CMA 5167/2023 4.For hearing of main case. 05-12-2023 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for the petitioner. ********** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Petitioner is a Field Assistant (BPS-16) in Wild Life Department Sukkur Division and has challenged promotion of respondents No.5&6 since 1989. On the very first date, since petitioner is a civil servant, he was put on notice to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this petition. We have heard petitioner’s counsel today. He has failed to satisfy as to why he did not challenge promotion of his colleagues and seek his own promotion, as prayed by him, within time and before the Sindh Service Tribunal, in accordance with law and, how in this petition, promotion awarded to respondents No.5&6 in 1989 can be questioned. The petition is therefore not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed along with listed applications in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
